description: Legal document or record. Quotes a ketubba verbatim (but is not the ketubba itself). Location: Fustat. Dated: Tuesday, 17 Sivan 1475 Seleucid, which is 1164 CE, under the reshut of Daniel ha-Nasi. Groom: Natan b. Moshe. Bride: Ḥusn bt. Ṣadaqa, virgin. Marriage payments: 5 + 10 = 15. Lists many items of the dowry, with real values given.
description_he: מסמך משפטי, פוסטאט, 1164, מצטט כתובה במילואה: חתן: נתן בן משה, כלה: חוסן בת צדקה, כולל רשימת נדוניה
